description_long: This is a two-story brick bakery building with a flat-roofed lower section and a gabled upper section. The ground floor features a storefront with a green-and-white striped awning, large display windows, and a wooden door, while the upper floor has large rectangular windows and a rooftop terrace. The terrace is furnished with wooden tables, chairs, and purple umbrellas, and is partially covered by a green trellis structure. The building sits on a street corner with sidewalks, street lamps, and a fire hydrant, and there is a garage or storage area visible on the side. The roof is brown with two chimneys and a weather vane, and the exterior walls are primarily red brick with some tan brickwork on the lower level. The overall appearance is inviting and functional, blending commercial and residential elements.
description: A two-story red brick bakery with a striped awning, large display windows, rooftop terrace with seating, and street corner placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bakery storefront with striped awning, display windows, and rooftop terrace with umbrellas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gabled brick wall, terrace seating, and the street corner layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two upper windows, brickwork, chimneys, and minimal street features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage/storage area, terrace, and adjacent sidewalk.
attribute_storefront_signage: There is a rectangular sign above the awning with the text 'Patisserie' in white on a dark background, bordered by a thin light frame. The sign is centered above the main entrance and is visually prominent.
attribute_display_window_with_baked_good: There is a large display window to the left of the entrance, but no baked goods or specific displays are visible through the window.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A green-and-white striped fabric awning is present above the storefront, but there is no visible bakery branding, logos, or text on the awning itself.
attribute_outdoor_seating_area: There is an outdoor seating area on the rooftop terrace, featuring at least two wooden tables, several wooden chairs, and two purple umbrellas. The seating is arranged in a casual, open layout with a partial green trellis covering.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a blend of traditional and contemporary urban commercial architecture, with red brickwork, a gabled roof, and a modern rooftop terrace. The style is reminiscent of early 20th-century urban storefronts with updated outdoor amenities.
